<> Use str_replace to swap the old link for the new one in your PHP string. This function handles multiple occurrences automatically. $str = 'New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

'; $newStr = str_replace('http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1', 'http://yahoo.com/abc1', $str); The word level is a palindrome that reads the same forward and backward.
